get.description: List registered workflows with metadata and capabilities.
Return the adapter-owned authoring contract for one workflow.

post.description:
Chat with the workflow-scoped agent for a registered workflow.

The endpoint is read-only and backed by a deterministic mock LLM client.
It returns a structured envelope; an unknown workflow yields ``ok=false``
with a ``WORKFLOW_NOT_FOUND`` issue rather than an HTTP 404.
Create or replay one run using a server-owned validated snapshot.

200.description: Idempotent replay of the snapshot's canonical run.

get.description: List canonical run summaries with strict keyset pagination.

post.description: Explicitly submit a planned run for durable worker execution.
Cancel before execution or request an acknowledged RQ process stop.

get.description: List run events with cursor pagination.
List log chunks for a run stream with cursor pagination.

post.description:
Trigger local preflight for an existing run.

The actual planning/materialization/dry-run work runs in a background task
so the HTTP response returns immediately with the run in ``VALIDATING``.

get.description: List persisted artifact references with a run-scoped keyset cursor.
Return one persisted artifact reference scoped to ``run_id``.
Stream one persisted run-scoped artifact through a safe descriptor.
List persisted QC metrics with a run-scoped keyset cursor.

AgentContext.title: AgentContext
AgentContext.description: Snapshot of platform state sent to the agent with a user message.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.default: This is a model-generated suggestion. Please verify against your experimental design and ENCODE guidelines.

AgentSuggestion.title: AgentSuggestion
AgentSuggestion.description: A model-generated suggestion returned by the agent.

AgentToolCall.title: AgentToolCall
AgentToolCall.description: Transparent record of a read-only tool invocation by the agent.

ArtifactReferenceResponse.title: ArtifactReferenceResponse

IssueResponse.title: IssueResponse
IssueResponse.description: JSON-ready Issue shape from the PR84 contract.

RunArtifactDetailResponse.description: Envelope for one run-scoped artifact reference.

RunArtifactDownloadErrorResponse.title: RunArtifactDownloadErrorResponse
RunArtifactDownloadErrorResponse.description: Disclosure-safe envelope for an artifact download failure.

RunStatus.title: RunStatus
RunStatus.description: Finite lifecycle statuses for a workflow run.

RunSummaryResponse.title: RunSummaryResponse
RunSummaryResponse.description: Strict disclosure-safe projection for one run-history row.

ValidatedInputSnapshotResponse.title: ValidatedInputSnapshotResponse
ValidatedInputSnapshotResponse.description: Safe public projection of one server-owned validation snapshot.

WorkflowInputLimitsResponse.title: WorkflowInputLimitsResponse
WorkflowInputLimitsResponse.description: Published projection of the platform-wide authoring ceilings.

WorkflowListItem.title: WorkflowListItem
WorkflowListItem.description: One entry in the workflow list response.

WorkflowSchemaCoverageResponse.title: WorkflowSchemaCoverageResponse
WorkflowSchemaCoverageResponse.description: Coverage level for each canonical adapter authoring surface.

WorkflowSchemaModesResponse.description: Adapter-declared modes for config, samples, and options.
